{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Eleven
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] refers to [[Eithan]] as [[Eleven]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eleven]] is a person addressed by [[Jai Daishou]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“Your path of recklessness led us here, Eleven.”<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
